name: asc
description: Community-maintained Codex skills for shipping apps with the unofficial asc App Store Connect CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Ship apps with the asc CLI
interface.longDescription: Use the asc CLI to build and upload apps, manage TestFlight, synchronize App Store metadata, prepare releases, submit versions for review, configure signing, and operate Apple Ads workflows.
defaultPrompt: Prepare and submit my app to App Store review with asc
Upload this build to TestFlight and distribute it safely
Audit and sync my App Store metadata with asc
